resultList.dtldesc: Experience luxury living in one of South Delhis most prestigious residential neighbourhoods with this spacious 4 BHK builder floor apartment in Kalkaji. Offering expansive interiors, premium specifications and excellent connectivity, this ready-to-move residence is ideal for families seeking comfort, privacy and a prime address.Property SpecificationsThis beautifully designed builder floor offers an impressive carpet area of 2700 sq. ft and is situated on the ground floor of a four-storey building. The residence comprises four spacious bedrooms and four well-appointed bathrooms, providing ample space for large families. Additional rooms include a dedicated puja room, store room and servant room, enhancing functionality and convenience. The apartment features separate living and dining areas that create an elegant and organised living environment. A modern modular kitchen with chimney and piped gas connection ensures a seamless cooking experience. Premium Italian marble flooring adds a sophisticated touch to the interiors while ensuring durability and timeless appeal. The home is Vastu-compliant and enjoys a south-west facing orientation. Being a newly constructed freehold property approved by the Municipal Corporation of Delhi, it offers both quality construction and secure ownership.FacilitiesDesigned to provide a comfortable and premium lifestyle, the apartment comes with two covered parking spaces for secure vehicle accommodation. Residents benefit from 24-hour water availability and reliable electricity supply with minimal power interruptions. The building is equipped with a lift for convenient access and CCTV surveillance for enhanced security. The property also features air-conditioning provisions, visitor parking and an intercom facility. Overlooking a landscaped park, the apartment enjoys pleasant green views and a peaceful residential atmosphere. The low-density nature of the building further enhances privacy and exclusivity.LocalityLocated in Kalkaji, the property enjoys exceptional connectivity to major commercial, educational and healthcare destinations across South Delhi. Situated near Kalkaji Police Station, the residence benefits from a well-established neighbourhood with excellent civic infrastructure. The area is well connected through the nearby Delhi Metro network, providing seamless access to different parts of the city. Reputed schools, hospitals, shopping centres, banks and everyday conveniences are located within close proximity, ensuring a comfortable lifestyle for residents. As one of the most sought-after residential areas in New Delhi, Kalkaji offers a perfect blend of urban convenience, connectivity and premium living. This spacious builder floor presents an outstanding opportunity for homebuyers seeking a high-quality residence in the heart of South Delhi.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover the ultimate in luxury and space with this magnificent 4 BHK builder floor in Unitech South City II, located in the highly coveted Sector 49 of Gurgaon. This premium residence offers a rare combination of privacy and community living, situated within one of the most established and well-regarded residential townships in the region. Designed for those who appreciate fine living, this home provides a sophisticated environment that meets the demands of a modern lifestyle while offering a peaceful retreat from the city's hustle. With its grand proportions and superior location, it represents an outstanding opportunity for families looking to settle in a prime Gurgaon neighbourhood.::::Property Specifications::The property boasts a vast super built-up area of 2500 sq. ft, ensuring generous living spaces for every member of the family. Occupying the entire 4th floor of a 4-storey building, this residence offers exclusivity and enhanced privacy. The floor plan includes four spacious bedrooms and four modern bathrooms, all designed with high-quality finishes. Being a fully furnished resale property, it is in ready-to-move condition, allowing for a seamless transition into your new home. The interiors are thoughtfully curated to maximise natural light and ventilation, creating a bright and airy atmosphere throughout the day.::::Facilities::Residents of this builder floor have access to a wealth of premium facilities within the Unitech South City II township. The project is equipped with essential amenities such as 24-hour security, power backup provisions, and high-speed lift access. Leisure and fitness needs are well-catered for with a gymnasium, swimming pool, club house, and dedicated kids' play area. Additionally, the property includes reserved parking and features like a cycling and jogging track, outdoor tennis courts, and beautifully landscaped gardens. The township also incorporates sustainable features such as rain water harvesting, ensuring a well-rounded and eco-friendly living experience.::::Locality::Sector 49 is a premier locality in Gurgaon, known for its excellent infrastructure and proximity to major commercial and social hubs. The property is exceptionally well-located, with reputable schools like St. Xavier's High School and GEMS Modern Academy just 1.0 km away. Healthcare needs are easily met with Park Hospital Gurgaon situated within a 1.0 km radius. For shopping and entertainment, Omaxe Gurgaon Mall and Spazedge Mall are a mere 0.6 km to 0.7 km away. The area is also home to significant business centres like Spaze Itech Park and Universal Trade Tower, making it a highly convenient location for professionals working in the city.
